summary: Two cases shown sequentially. CASE 1: BLUE vertical polarizer + GREEN horizontal polarizer — 0% transmission (RED caption I_final = 0). CASE 2: BLUE vertical + PURPLE 45° + GREEN horizontal — 1/8 transmission (YELLOW caption I = I_0/2·cos²45°·cos²45° = I_0/8). Each case draws polarizer Circles with axis Line, a beam Line whose stroke_width is proportional to intensity along each segment, and MathTex intensity labels above each stretch. SurroundingRectangle highlights the final formula. Closing note: adding a filter INCREASES transmission.
